title: Laser powder bed fusion process feedback control based on in-situ powder layer thickness
description: Metal laser powder bed fusion (LPBF) is a promising additive manufacturing technique for producing complex metal parts.
text:
Neira Arango, J. and Yeung, H. (2025), Laser powder bed fusion process feedback control based on in-situ powder layer thickness, Manufacturing Science and Engineering Conference (MSEC) 2025, Greenville, SC, US, [online], https://tsapps.nist.gov/publication/get_pdf.cfm?pub_id=958618 (Accessed March 1, 2026)
